specific_question: As of Q4 2024, what self-service resources are available for patients seeking billing or next-steps information at MediConn Solutions?
answer: As of Q4 2025, MediConn Solutions has a basic FAQ page covering general topics, but lacks searchable knowledge base articles about specific scenarios (e.g., "How do I get a prescription refill?" or "Why was I charged twice?"). In Q3 2025, 68% of customers who checked FAQs still contacted support, according to a January 2024 poll of customers conducted by Mediconn's customer service team.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
